challenge.title: Korak 6
challenge.description:
Sledeći korak je dodavanje povezanog elementa input za informacije o učeniku.

Počnite dodavanjem elementa input sa atributom type postavljenim na "text". Zatim dodajte atribut name i atribut id, oba postavljena na student-name.

Nakon toga, dodajte atribut placeholder postavljenog na E.g., Jane Doe. I konačno, dodajte atribut required.

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
Parent Teacher Conference Form

Please fill out the form below to help schedule your parent-teacher conference.

Student Information

tests.text: Your input element should have a type attribute set to "text".
Tvoj element input treba da ima atribut name postavljen na "student-name".
Your input element should have an id attribute set to "student-name".
Your input element should have a placeholder attribute set to E.g., Jane Doe.
tests.testString:
const inputEl = document.querySelector("fieldset input");
assert.strictEqual(inputEl?.getAttribute("placeholder"), "E.g., Jane Doe");
